turns.content:
Bạn là subagent gsd-planner. Tạo PLAN.md cho phase P24.3.1 — Governance Session Prototype.

## BẮT BUỘC ĐỌC

1. **SPEC.md:** `.planning/phases/24.3.1-governance-session-prototype/24.3.1-SPEC.md` — 9 falsifiable requirements
2. **RESEARCH.md:** `.planning/phases/24.3.1-governance-session-prototype/24.3.1-RESEARCH.md` — API signatures, feasibility, code references
3. **MỘT file tool example** trong `src/tools/` (bất kỳ) — học pattern tool registration
4. **src/shared/session-api.ts** — existing wrapper functions

## Phase Info

- **Phase:** P24.3.1 — Governance Session Prototype
- **Cluster:** C — Routing System (validate feasibility for P24.3)
- **Depends On:** P24
- **Evidence Required:** L2-L3

## Nhiệm vụ

Tạo PLAN.md với 2-3 task plans, dependency waves, verification commands.

### Wave 1: Core Tool Implementation
**Task 1.1:** Tạo `src/features/governance-engine/create-governance-session.ts`
- Custom tool với Zod schema (REQ-02)
- `sdk.session.create()` với title `hm-governance:<workflow>-<context>` (REQ-03)
- `sdk.session.prompt()` / `promptAsync()` injection (REQ-04)
- `sdk.tui.showToast()` notification (REQ-05)
- Git commit `execSync('git add -A && git commit -m ...')` (REQ-06)
- Return `{ sessionID, title }` (REQ-07)
- JSDoc documentation

**Task 1.2:** Tạo thư mục `src/features/governance-engine/` với `.gitkeep` + `index.ts`

### Wave 2: Plugin Registration + Tests
**Task 2.1:** Register tool trong `src/plugin.ts` (REQ-01)
- Import + thêm vào `tool:` object

**Task 2.2:** Unit test tại `tests/features/governance-engine/create-governance-session.test.ts`
- Mock SDK calls
- Verify title format, prompt call, toast call, git commit
- Verify return shape

### Wave 3: Verification
**Task 3.1:** Typecheck + run all tests (REQ-08, REQ-09)
- `npx tsc --noEmit`
- `npx vitest run tests/features/governance-engine/`
- Verify no existing tests broken

## Constraints
- Atomic commit mỗi task
- JSDoc trên mọi function/class (load jsdoc-typescript-docs skill)
- Không add npm dependencies
- Không modify existing tools/hooks
- PLAN.md format: task plan với dependency waves, verification commands mỗi task
- Commit format: `phase(24.3.1): what changed — why it matters`

Now let me update the ROADMAP.md with the plans section:

## PLANNING COMPLETE

**Phase:** 24.3.1 — Governance Session Prototype
**Plans:** 3 plan(s) in 3 wave(s)

### Wave Structure

| Wave | Plans | Autonomous | Description |
|------|-------|------------|-------------|
| 1 | 24.3.1-01 | yes | Feature directory + `createGovernanceSessionTool` implementation |
| 2 | 24.3.1-02 | yes | Plugin registration + unit tests with mocked SDK calls |
| 3 | 24.3.1-03 | yes | Full verification (typecheck, tests, regression, grep evidence) |

### Plans Created

| Plan | Objective | Tasks | Files |
|------|-----------|-------|-------|
| 24.3.1-01 | Feature dir + tool implementation | 2 | `src/features/governance-engine/.gitkeep`, `index.ts`, `create-governance-session.ts` |
| 24.3.1-02 | Plugin registration + tests | 2 | `src/plugin.ts`, `tests/features/governance-engine/` |
| 24.3.1-03 | Full verification | 1 | (verification commands only — no file mods) |

### REQ Coverage Map

| REQ | Description | Plan | Verification |
|-----|-------------|------|-------------|
| REQ-01 | Tool registered in plugin.ts | 24.3.1-02 Task 2.1 | `grep` in plugin.ts |
| REQ-02 | Args schema (agent, brief, optional title) | 24.3.1-01 Task 1.2 | Zod schema + unit test |
| REQ-03 | Session title `hm-governance:` format | 24.3.1-01 Task 1.2 | Unit test regex match |
| REQ-04 | `sendPrompt()` call on new session | 24.3.1-01 Task 1.2 | Unit test prompt call |
| REQ-05 | `showTuiToast()` call | 24.3.1-01 Task 1.2 | Unit test toast call |
| REQ-06 | Git commit before session creation | 24.3.1-01 Task 1.2 | Unit test execSync |
| REQ-07 | Return `{ sessionID, title }` | 24.3.1-01 Task 1.2 | Source + unit test |
| REQ-08 | TypeScript compiles | 24.3.1-03 Task 3.1 | `npx tsc --noEmit` |
| REQ-09 | All tests pass | 24.3.1-03 Task 3.1 | `npx vitest run tests/features/governance-engine/` |

### Key Design Decisions

1. **Factory pattern** — Tool uses closure over `client` (RESEARCH.md Pitfall 2), matching `execute-slash-command.ts` pattern
2. **Zod safeParse inside execute** — Follows delegate-task.ts double-validation pattern (tool.schema + Zod runtime)
3. **Git commit is best-effort** — Wrapped in try/catch; failure never propagates
4. **Session title** — `hm-governance:${agent}-${title}` if title provided, else `hm-governance:${agent}-governance`
5. **No CONTEXT.md** — No locked decisions to honor; plans derive from SPEC.md + RESEARCH.md

### Next Steps

Execute: `/gsd-execute-phase 24.3.1`

<sub>`/clear` first - fresh context window</sub>
